title: DUX v9.5 Flow Object
description: Behavior orchestration defining sequences of atomic user actions - maps user workflows and journey phases

object_type.description: Object type discriminator - always 'Flow' for Flow objects

user_scenario.description: Context or situation that triggers this flow

behavior_sequence.description: Ordered sequence of behavior IDs that make up this flow

end_user.description: User personas or roles who execute this flow

problem_ids.description: Problem IDs that this flow addresses

problem_ids_evidence_status.description: Evidence status for the problem-flow relationship

journey_type.description: Type of journey: user_flow (single workflow) or phase_journey (lifecycle phase)

evidence_status.description: System-derived evidence quality: evidence_backed (2+ evidence, 1+ quantitative), evidence_present (1+ evidence, may lack quantitative), assumptive (recommend phase or no supporting evidence)

evidence.description: Evidence supporting this flow's sequence and importance

evidence_teaser.description: Brief insight hook for pain points, stats, or key findings

tags.description: System-derived tags generated by NotebookLM DUX scan - not manually set
